title: Prevent Remote Devices from Using Split Tunneling
description: Prevent remote devices from simultaneously establishing non-remote connections with the system and communicating via some other connection to resources in external networks (i.e., split tunneling).

checks.name: VPN Split Tunneling is Disabled
checks.purpose: Verify VPN client configurations have SplitTunneling set to False, ensuring all traffic routes through the corporate VPN when connected

checks.name: Default Route Passes Through VPN Interface
checks.purpose: Confirm the routing table shows the default route (0.0.0.0/0) directs all traffic through the VPN interface when VPN is connected

checks.name: Split Tunneling Policy Documented
checks.purpose: Verify organizational policy prohibits split tunneling for remote access connections — policy review only

checks.name: VPN Split Tunneling is Disabled
checks.purpose: Verify VPN configurations on the server disable split tunneling, routing all traffic through the corporate tunnel

checks.name: Default Route Passes Through VPN Interface
checks.purpose: Confirm default routes are directed through the VPN tunnel interface on the server

checks.name: Split Tunneling Policy Enforced via GPO
checks.purpose: Verify GPO enforces split tunneling prohibition for all remote access connections — policy review only

checks.name: VPN Configuration Routes All Traffic Through Tunnel
checks.purpose: Verify OpenVPN configs include redirect-gateway def1 or WireGuard configs use AllowedIPs = 0.0.0.0/0 to prevent split tunneling

checks.name: Split Tunneling Policy Documented
checks.purpose: Verify organizational policy prohibits split tunneling for remote access — policy review only

checks.name: VPN Configuration Routes All Traffic Through Tunnel
checks.purpose: Verify OpenVPN configs include redirect-gateway def1 or WireGuard configs use AllowedIPs = 0.0.0.0/0 to prevent split tunneling

checks.name: Split Tunneling Policy Documented
checks.purpose: Verify organizational policy prohibits split tunneling for remote access — policy review only

remediation: Configure all VPN client profiles to disable split tunneling (SplitTunneling = False in PowerShell VPN profile). Enforce via GPO. On Linux, add 'redirect-gateway def1' to OpenVPN .conf files or set 'AllowedIPs = 0.0.0.0/0, ::/0' in WireGuard peer configurations.
